parts.text: /review Re-check retry-path cancel handling in workspace-deployment-runner.ts after preserving cancel intent (no clear+requeue on accepted cancel). Blocking issues only.

state.title: cancel|retry|requeue|accepted|clear

state.output:
<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1080:   const sourceBundleKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/deployments/${deploymentId}/${sourceBundle.objectKeySuffix}`;
1081:   await bucket.put(sourceBundleKey, sourceBundle.bytes, {
1082:     httpMetadata: {
1083:       contentType: 'application/gzip',
1084:     },
1085:     customMetadata: {
1086:       workspace_id: workspaceId,
1087:       deployment_id: deploymentId,
1088:       source_snapshot_sha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1089:     },
1090:   });
1091:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1092: 
1093:   let outputBundle = sourceBundle;
1094:   let publishOutputDir = workspaceProjectRoot;
1095:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1096:     const relativeOutputDir = publishOptions.outputDir;
1097:     if (!relativeOutputDir) {
1098:       throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider');
1099:     }
1100:     publishOutputDir =
1101:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.'
1102:         ? normalizeProjectRoot(relativeOutputDir)
1103:         : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${relativeOutputDir}`);
1104:     outputBundle = await createOutputBundle(sandbox, publishOutputDir);
1105:   }
1106: 
1107:   let createResult;
1108:   try {
1109:     createResult = await provider.createDeployment({
1110:       workspaceId,
1111:       deploymentId,
1112:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1113:       outputBundle: {
1114:         bytes: outputBundle.bytes,
1115:         sha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1116:       },
1117:     });
1118:   } catch (error) {
1119:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1120:     if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1121:       throw new QueueRetryError('Provider create deployment request is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1122:     }
1123:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1124:   }
1125:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1126:     workspaceId,
1127:     deploymentId,
1128:     eventType: 'deployment_provider_created',
1129:     payload: {
1130:       provider: publishOptions.provider,
1131:       providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1132:       status: createResult.status,
1133:       deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1134:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1135:     },
1136:   });
1137:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
1138:     workspaceId,
1139:     providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1140:   });
1141: 
1142:   let providerStatus: WorkspaceDeployStatusResult = {
1143:     status: createResult.status,
1144:     deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1145:   };
1146:   let cancelAttempted = false;
1147:   let cancelAccepted = false;
1148:   const maxPollAttempts = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_MAX_POLLS, 120, 1, 600);
1149:   const pollIntervalMs = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, 1500, 50, 10000);
1150:   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPollAttempts; attempt += 1) {
1151:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId).catch(async (error) => {
1152:         if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1153:           if (!cancelAttempted) {
1154:             cancelAttempted = true;
1155:             let cancel;
1156:             try {
1157:               cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1158:             } catch (providerCancelError) {
1159:               const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1160:               if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1161:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1162:               }
1163:               throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1164:             }
1165:             cancelAccepted = cancel.accepted;
1166:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1167:               workspaceId,
1168:             deploymentId,
1169:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1170:             payload: {
1171:               providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1172:               accepted: cancel.accepted,
1173:               },
1174:             });
1175:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1176:               await env.DB
1177:                 .prepare(
1178:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1179:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1180:                        updated_at = ?
1181:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1182:                 )
1183:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1184:                 .run();
1185:             }
1186:           }
1187:           if (cancelAccepted) {
1188:             return;
1189:           }
1190:         return;
1191:       }
1192:       throw error;
1193:     });
1194: 
1195:     if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded' || providerStatus.status === 'failed' || providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1196:       break;
1197:     }
1198: 
1199:     await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, pollIntervalMs));
1200:     try {
1201:       providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1202:     } catch (error) {
1203:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1204:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1205:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider status endpoint is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1206:       }
1207:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1208:     }
1209:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1210:       workspaceId,
1211:       deploymentId,
1212:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_status',
1213:       payload: {
1214:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1215:         status: providerStatus.status,
1216:         deployedUrl: providerStatus.deployedUrl,
1217:       },
1218:     });
1219:   }
1220: 
1221:   if (providerStatus.status === 'queued' || providerStatus.status === 'running') {
1222:     throw new PolicyError(
1223:       'provider_deploy_failed',
1224:       `Provider deployment did not reach terminal state within polling window (${maxPollAttempts} attempts)`
1225:     );
1226:   }
1227: 
1228:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1229:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1230:   }
1231: 
1232:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1233:     await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1234:     return;
1235:   }
1236: 
1237:   const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1238:   if (!deployedUrl) {
1239:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1240:   }
1241: 
1242:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1243:   const successResult = {
1244:     url: deployedUrl,
1245:     artifact: {
1246:       sourceBundleKey,
1247:       sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1248:       outputBundleSha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1249:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1250:     },
1251:     provenance: {
1252:       workspaceId,
1253:       taskId,
1254:       operationId,
1255:       trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' ? provenance.trigger : 'manual',
1256:     },
1257:     rollbackOnFailure,
1258:   };
1259: 
1260:   let markedSucceeded = await markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(env.DB, {
1261:     workspaceId,
1262:     deploymentId,
1263:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1264:     sourceBundleKey,
1265:     deployedUrl,
1266:     providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1267:     result: successResult,
1268:     finishedAt,
1269:   });
1270: 
1271:   if (!markedSucceeded) {
1272:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1273:     if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt && providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1274:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1275:         workspaceId,
1276:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1277:         sourceBundleKey,
1278:         deployedUrl,
1279:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1280:         cancelRequestedAt: null,
1281:         result: successResult,
1282:         errorCode: null,
1283:         errorMessage: null,
1284:         finishedAt,
1285:       });
1286:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1287:         workspaceId,
1288:         deploymentId,
1289:         eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1290:         payload: {
1291:           providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1292:           providerStatus: providerStatus.status,
1293:         },
1294:       });
1295:       markedSucceeded = true;
1296:     } else if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1297:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1298:       return;
1299:     } else {
1300:       return;
1301:     }
1302:   }
1303: 
1304:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1305:     workspaceId,
1306:     deploymentId,
1307:     eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1308:       payload: {
1309:         deployedUrl,
1310:         sourceBundleKey,
1311:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1312:       },
1313:     });
1314: 
1315:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1316:     deploymentId,
1317:     status: 'succeeded',
1318:     deployedUrl,
1319:     deployedAt: finishedAt,
1320:     errorCode: null,
1321:     errorMessage: null,
1322:   });
1323: }

1325: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1326:   env: Env,
1327:   workspaceId: string,
1328:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1329: ): Promise<{
1330:   ok: boolean;
1331:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1332:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1333:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
1334: }> {
1335:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1336:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1337:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1338:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1339:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1340:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1341:   }
1342:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });
1343: 
1344:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1345:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
1346:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
1347:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1348:   try {
1349:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
1350:   } catch (error) {
1351:     checks.push({
1352:       code: 'project_root',
1353:       ok: false,
1354:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1355:     });
1356:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1357:   }
1358:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1359:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);
1360:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runBuildIfPresent, true);
1361:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(options?.runTestsIfPresent, true);
1362:   const provider = options?.provider ?? getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
1363:   const outputDir = parseString(options?.outputDir);
1364: 
1365:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1366:     if (!outputDir) {
1367:       checks.push({
1368:         code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
1369:         ok: false,
1370:         details: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider',
1371:       });
1372:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1373:     }
1374: 
1375:     const effectiveOutputDir =
1376:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? outputDir : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${outputDir}`);
1377:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_output_dir', ok: true, details: effectiveOutputDir });
1378:   }
1379: 
1380:   try {
1381:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1382:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true });
1383:   } catch (error) {
1384:     const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1385:     if (!autoFixBaseline) {
1386:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1387:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1388:     }
1389: 
1390:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
1391:     if (!rehydrated) {
1392:       checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: false, details });
1393:       remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: false, details: 'auto-fix failed' });
1394:       return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1395:     }
1396:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
1397:     checks.push({ code: 'git_baseline', ok: true, details: 'auto-fixed baseline rehydrate' });
1398:   }
1399: 
1400:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
1401:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
1402:     autoFixBootstrapToolchain && ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest));
1403:   checks.push({
1404:     code: 'detected_scripts',
1405:     ok: true,
1406:     details: JSON.stringify({ hasBuild: scripts.hasBuild, hasTest: scripts.hasTest }),
1407:   });
1408: 
1409:   const secrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
1410:   if (secrets.length > 0) {
1411:     checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: false, details: secrets.join(', ') });
1412:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1413:   }
1414:   checks.push({ code: 'secret_scan', ok: true });
1415: 
1416:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
1417:   try {
1418:     toolchain = await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
1419:       sandbox,
1420:       workspaceProjectRoot
1421:     );
1422:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_detect', ok: true, details: JSON.stringify(toolchain) });
1423:   } catch (error) {
1424:     checks.push({
1425:       code: 'toolchain_detect',
1426:       ok: false,
1427:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1428:     });
1429:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1430:   }
1431: 
1432:   if (shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
1433:     try {
1434:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
1435:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true });
1436:       remediations.push({
1437:         code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped',
1438:         applied: toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn',
1439:       });
1440:     } catch (error) {
1441:       checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: false, details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
1442:       remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: false });
1443:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1444:     }
1445:   } else {
1446:     checks.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrap', ok: true, details: 'skipped' });
1447:   }
1448: 
1449:   if ((runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) || (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest)) {
1450:     const manager = managerBinary(toolchain);
1451:     const managerCheck = await sandbox.exec(`command -v ${manager} >/dev/null 2>&1`);
1452:     if (managerCheck.exitCode !== 0) {
1453:       checks.push({
1454:         code: 'validation_tooling',
1455:         ok: false,
1456:         details: `${manager} is not available in sandbox runtime`,
1457:       });
1458:       return { ok: false, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1459:     }
1460:   }
1461:   checks.push({ code: 'validation_tooling', ok: true });
1462: 
1463:   return { ok: true, toolchain, checks, remediations };
1464: }
1465: 
1466: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1467:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1468:   if (!claimed) {
1469:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1470:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1471:       try {
1472:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1473:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1474:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1475:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1476:         }
1477:       }
1478:       return;
1479:     }
1480: 
1481:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1482:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1483:       return;
1484:     }
1485: 
1486:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1487:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1488:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1489:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1490:           return;
1491:         }
1492:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1493:           workspaceId,
1494:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1495:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1496:         });
1497:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1498:           workspaceId,
1499:           deploymentId,
1500:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1501:           payload: {
1502:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1503:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1504:           },
1505:         });
1506:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1507:           deploymentId,
1508:           status: 'failed',
1509:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1510:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1511:         });
1512:         return;
1513:       }
1514: 
1515:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1516:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1517:       }
1518: 
1519:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1520:     }
1521:     return;
1522:   }
1523: 
1524:   try {
1525:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1526:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1527:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1528:         workspaceId,
1529:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1530:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1531:       });
1532:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1533:         workspaceId,
1534:         deploymentId,
1535:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1536:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1537:       });
1538:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1539:         deploymentId,
1540:         status: 'failed',
1541:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1542:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1543:       });
1544:       return;
1545:     }
1546: 
1547:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1548:   } catch (error) {
1549:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1550:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1551:       try {
1552:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1553:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1554:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1555:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1556:         }
1557:       }
1558:       return;
1559:     }
1560: 
1561:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1562:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1563:       return;
1564:     }
1565: 
1566:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1567:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1568:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1569:         true
1570:       );
1571:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1572: 
1573:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1574:         workspaceId,
1575:         errorCode: error.code,
1576:         errorMessage: error.message,
1577:         result: { rollback },
1578:       });
1579:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1580:         workspaceId,
1581:         deploymentId,
1582:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1583:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1584:       });
1585:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1586:         deploymentId,
1587:         status: 'failed',
1588:         errorCode: error.code,
1589:         errorMessage: error.message,
1590:       });
1591:       return;
1592:     }
1593: 
1594:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1595:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1596:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1597:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1598:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1599:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1600:         let cancelAcceptedByProvider = false;
1601:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1602:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1603: 
1604:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1605:           try {
1606:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1607:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1608:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1609:               workspaceId,
1610:               deploymentId,
1611:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1612:               payload: {
1613:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1614:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1615:                 retryPath: true,
1616:               },
1617:             });
1618:             if (cancel.accepted) {
1619:               cancelAcceptedByProvider = true;
1620:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1621:             } else {
1622:               await env.DB
1623:                 .prepare(
1624:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1625:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1626:                        updated_at = ?
1627:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1628:                 )
1629:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1630:                 .run();
1631:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1632:             }
1633:           } catch (providerCancelError) {
1634:             if (providerCancelError instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1635:               throw providerCancelError;
1636:             }
1637:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1638:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1639:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1640:             }
1641:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1642:           }
1643:         }
1644: 
1645:         if (cancelAcceptedByProvider) {
1646:           throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1647:         }
1648: 
1649:         if (shouldCancelLocally) {
1650:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1651:           return;
1652:         }
1653:       }
1654: 
1655:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1656:         workspaceId,
1657:         startedAt: null,
1658:         finishedAt: null,
1659:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1660:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1661:       });
1662:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1663:         workspaceId,
1664:         deploymentId,
1665:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1666:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
1667:       });
1668:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
1669:     }
1670: 
1671:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1672:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1673:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1674:       true
1675:     );
1676:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1677: 
1678:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1679:       workspaceId,
1680:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1681:       errorMessage: message,
1682:       result: { rollback },
1683:     });
1684:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1685:       workspaceId,
1686:       deploymentId,
1687:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',

1689:         code: 'deployment_failed',
1690:         message,
1691:         rollback,
1692:       },
1693:     });
1694:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {

1697:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1698:       errorMessage: message,
1699:     });
1700:   }
1701: }

1703: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1704:   env: Env,
1705:   workspaceId: string,
1706:   deploymentId: string,
1707:   maxCycles = 8
1708: ): Promise<void> {
1709:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
1710:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1711:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
1712:       return false;
1713:     }
1714: 
1715:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
1716:       return false;
1717:     }
1718: 
1719:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
1720:       return false;
1721:     }
1722: 
1723:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1724:       workspaceId,
1725:       startedAt: null,
1726:       finishedAt: null,
1727:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1728:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
1729:     });
1730:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1731:       workspaceId,
1732:       deploymentId,
1733:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1734:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
1735:     });
1736:     return true;
1737:   }
1738: 
1739:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1740:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
1741:     try {
1742:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1743:     } catch (error) {
1744:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
1745:         return;
1746:       }
1747: 
1748:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
1749:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
1750:         try {
1751:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
1752:           if (recovered) {
1753:             continue;
1754:           }
1755:         } catch {
1756:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
1757:         }
1758:       }
1759:     }
1760: 
1761:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1762:     if (!latest) {
1763:       return;
1764:     }
1765:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1766:       return;
1767:     }
1768:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
1769:       continue;
1770:     }
1771:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1772:       return;
1773:     }
1774:   }
1775: }

2299: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
2300:   db: D1Database,
2301:   input: {
2302:     workspaceId: string;
2303:     deploymentId: string;

2305:     payload: unknown;

2313:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();

2317:   }
2318: 
2319:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);
2320:   await db
2321:     .prepare(

2323:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2324:     )
2325:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.deploymentId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))

parts.text:
Found 1 blocking issue.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1645` + `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1515` create a stuck state after **accepted** cancel in the retry path.  
  When cancel is accepted, code throws `QueueRetryError` without changing status from `running`; on redelivery, `claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution` can’t claim running rows, and the `existing.cancelRequestedAt` branch just throws another retry (“wait for active attempt to reconcile”). But there is no active attempt anymore, so the deployment can loop in retry until stale-timeout cleanup instead of completing cancel promptly.  
  This is blocking because accepted cancels can hang for a long time and never reconcile via normal flow.
